mapper.select:
SELECT e.*, d.dept_name AS deptName, p.post_name AS postName FROM hr_employee e LEFT JOIN hr_department d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN hr_position p ON e.post_id = p.id WHERE e.deleted = 0
AND e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND e.emp_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{empNo}, '%')
AND e.dept_id = #{deptId}
ORDER BY e.created_at DESC
